reason: Round 2 advanced evidence from MODERATE to MODERATE-STRONG. Three key findings: (1) GSEA revealed mitochondrial respiratory chain and translation enrichment in turquoise (NES=-2.80, -2.71) that ORA completely missed; (2) ECM score correlates with green (r=+0.69) and turquoise (r=+0.41), adding structural adaptation dimension; (3) Signed network confirms turquoise persists (7 modules vs 5), not an unsigned artifact. Caveats: KEGG failed (network), GSEA p.adjust borderline (0.043-0.047), signed-unsigned gene overlap not quantified. Manuscript-ready with mitochondrial energy metabolism as headline.
next_steps: Rerun KEGG enrichment with network access
Quantify signed vs unsigned turquoise gene overlap
Final report and sync to Obsidian
